creator: statue@freebsd.sinica.edu.tw
text:
Fix: 

MASTERDIR=     ${.CURDIR}/../../editors/joe

 PATCHFILES=    zh-joe-2.8_3-patch
 PATCH_DIST_STRIP=      -p1

-MAINTAINER=    statue@mail.elife.idv.tw
+MAINTAINER=    statue@freebsd.sinica.edu.tw

 MD5_FILE=      ${.CURDIR}/distinfo--MwwCuZs00NtziPeNHw8eZOl5Hrt3HGzq7YpQ7t3ZKIjCTBKn

Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig       Sun Mar 18 16:05:24 2001
+++ Makefile    Sat Mar 31 00:17:46 2001
